form.formComment: Placed last time (23.22) at this track in a Grade 4/5, finishing third and beaten 3.5 lengths. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and two minors. Expected to go close.

form.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at this track over 400m in 22.85. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when fourth over 400m at this track at Grade 4/5 level. Has claims on best form.

form.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage sixth but before that won by a nose at Taree Super Track (17.55) beating Kiarni Bolt in a Grade 4/5 on April 8. Has ability and worth including.

form.formComment: Solid performance to post a big 4.5 lengths win at this track over 400m (23.27) beating Let's Trot Vixen in Grade 5 on April 11. Makes plenty of appeal. Go close again.

form.formComment: Won her last four in a row including a strong win last start over 400m at this track by 2.5 lengths in a Grade 5. On a hot winning streak and likely to score again.

form.formComment: Ordinary effort last start when sixth over 525m at Taree Super Track. Prior to that won comfortably by 7 lengths at Taree Super Track (30.21) beating Apache Tiger in a NG on April 1. Well placed and among the chances here.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by a neck over 400m at this track in a handy (23.04), beating Done Dealing. Will find this a bit tougher, prepared to risk on this occasion.
